title: <div>I came from a family of blue-collar workers, as the weather of time continu
content: I came from a family of blue-collar workers, as the weather of time continues to spin on, we find that lesson this blue-collar workers are needed and there is a massive shift into white-collar work and beyond that the automation of all non-creative work. Interestingly enough, and my family my maternal and paternal side both cut a path for themselves and work for themselves their entire life, and then my stepparent sides also kind of life for themselves that didn’t have a boss above them
context: From document: I came from a family of blue-collar workers, as the weather of time…
